variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 4035 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 4035 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 4035 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 32 199 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 4035
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25797 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 4035
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25797 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
